title: agent-blueprints taxonomy.yaml schema
description: Validates the root taxonomy.yaml file that declares every cognitive-unit cohort in the repo.

schema_version.description: Version of this taxonomy.yaml's own schema. Bumped only when taxonomy.yaml's shape changes.

catalog_schema_version.description: Version emitted as the top-level schema_version in patterns-catalog.yaml. Independent of this file's own schema_version.

generator_version.description: Semver string emitted as patterns-catalog.yaml's generator_version. Bumped manually when the emitter's output format changes.

cohorts.description: Cohorts in declaration order. Order is preserved for stable emit ordering and for the contributor walkthrough.

derived_views.description: Backward-compatibility views: each is a filtered sub-set of an existing cohort emitted under its own catalog key.

id.description: Cohort identifier. Matches the directory name (snake_case).

dir.description: Path to the cohort's directory, repo-root-relative. Usually equals id.

description.description: One-paragraph cohort description. Surfaced in the contributor guide.

category_values.description: Allowed metadata.json `category` values for entries in this cohort.

catalog_key.description: Top-level key under which entries appear in patterns-catalog.yaml.

requires_state_schema.description: Predicate evaluated against each entry's metadata; when true, schemas/state.py is required.

extra_fields.description: Cohort-specific metadata.json fields beyond the base contract (id, name, category, complexity, description, tiers, evolvesFrom, composableWith, requires, tags, costTier, latencyTier).

catalog_key.description: Top-level catalog key the view is emitted under.

description.description: What this derived view is for. Documentation only.

expression.description: A tiny expression over an entry's metadata. Supported forms today: `true`, `false`, `category == 'X'`, `category != 'X'`. Extend the evaluator if new forms are needed.
